description_long: This is a brown glass beer bottle with a long neck and a crown cap. The front label is yellow with red and black text, featuring a detailed crest or emblem with a central illustration and decorative elements. The neck of the bottle also has a matching label with similar colors and text. The bottle is cylindrical with a slightly wider base and a smooth, glossy surface. The back of the bottle is mostly plain brown glass, with only a small portion of the label visible. There are no visible signs of condensation or liquid on the exterior.
description: A brown glass beer bottle with a yellow and red decorative label and a crown cap, featuring a crest emblem on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full yellow label with red text and a crest emblem, as well as the neck label and crown cap.
description_view_1: Rear angled view showing mostly plain brown glass with the edge of the label visible on the right side.
description_view_2: Direct back view showing the unadorned brown glass and a small, dark rectangular patch where a back label might be.
description_view_3: Side view with the label partially visible, curving around the bottle, and the neck label in view.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a yellow background with red and black text, a central crest emblem with detailed illustration, and decorative borders. The typography is bold and stylized, with a classic, vintage-inspired design.
